---
title: "Page 2 - Code Output Interpretation"
id: "mod001-se01-sec08-sp02"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec08"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---









## Data or visual

_Insert your table, graph, or visualization here._

## What to notice

_Call out specific features, trends, or anomalies the learner should observe._

## Interpretation

_Explain what the data means and how it should be interpreted._

## Why it matters

_Explain the importance of being able to interpret this specific data._

---

## Learning Activities



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set expectations for looking at this code output or result._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.output-analysis}
**Output Analysis**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the code output or result placeholder here._]

**Interpretation:**
- Observation 1
- Observation 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Expert Deep-Dive**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a detailed analysis of what these results mean for the broader context._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt after the output interpretation._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set the scene for this interpretation task (e.g. 'Look closely at the figure below')._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.interpretation}
**Critical Interpretation**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Prompt the learner to interpret a specific figure, table, or output._]

**What to consider:**
- Observation 1
- Observation 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Expert Guidance**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add guidance or key things that should have been noticed._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the interpretation._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->



---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set expectations for looking at this code output or result._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.output-analysis}
**Output Analysis**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the code output or result placeholder here._]

**Interpretation:**
- Observation 1
- Observation 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Expert Deep-Dive**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a detailed analysis of what these results mean for the broader context._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt after the output interpretation._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set the scene for this interpretation task (e.g. 'Look closely at the figure below')._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.interpretation}
**Critical Interpretation**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Prompt the learner to interpret a specific figure, table, or output._]

**What to consider:**
- Observation 1
- Observation 2
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
::: {.callout-tip}
**Expert Guidance**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add guidance or key things that should have been noticed._]
:::

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or next-step prompt after the interpretation._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec08-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 1 - Code Example and Code Along</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec08-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Worked and Try Calculation</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
